name: Unforgettable Houseboats
note: Long-running Mannum operator with a fleet of six luxury Murray River houseboats from 2-4 up to 10-12 berths.

name: White Houseboats
note: Four five-star self-drive vessels (Whitewater, Flat White, Absolute Bliss, Riverdance) hired from Mannum Waters Marina on the River Murray.

name: Kia Marina Houseboat Hire
note: Fleet of eleven self-drive Murray River houseboats from 2 to 12 berths, based upstream of Mannum with 25+ years' experience.

name: Wow Houseboats
note: Luxury self-drive River Murray houseboats hired from Riverglen Marina at White Sands, just downstream of Murray Bridge.

name: River Wren Riverboats
note: Self-drive open-plan riverboats for couples and small groups based near Murray Bridge on the River Murray.

name: River Girl Houseboat
note: Two-to-four berth self-drive houseboat hired from Murray Bridge and listed with the Houseboat Hirers Association.

name: Oz Houseboats
note: South Australian houseboat hire business offering self-drive vessels on the River Murray near Murray Bridge.

name: Renmark Houseboats
note: Pet-friendly Riverland fleet ranging from 2 to 12 berths for self-drive Murray River holidays out of Renmark.

name: River Murray Houseboats (Riverland Houseboat Hire)
note: Renmark-based operator running since 1994 with nine luxury self-drive houseboats on the Murray River.

name: Quality Houseboats
note: Riverland self-drive houseboat hire on the Murray River, including the five-bedroom en-suite Murray Explorer.

name: Foxtale Houseboats
note: Pet-friendly self-drive fleet of luxury 2-12 berth houseboats based at Morgan on the Murray River.

name: Riverland Houseboats Loxton
note: Family-owned 'Kiwi-Oz' houseboat hire at Loxton on the Murray River in the Riverland.

name: Uncork'd Houseboat
note: Newly renovated 10-berth solar-powered houseboat for hire at Loxton on the Murray River.

name: Murray River Trails
note: Operates the eco-luxe 'HIGH RIVER' houseboat for guided all-inclusive tours and public summer hire in the Riverland.

name: Moon Dance Houseboat
note: Self-drive luxury houseboat moored at Kia Marina near Mannum on the Murray River.

name: Moon Rise Houseboat
note: Twelve-berth luxury self-drive houseboat hired from the Mannum reach of the Murray River.

name: New Horizons Houseboat
note: Self-drive luxury houseboat based at Kia Marina near Mannum on the Murray River.

name: Imagine Houseboat
note: Self-drive houseboat for hire on the Mannum stretch of the River Murray.

name: Elfin Houseboat
note: Compact 2-4 berth easy-to-drive houseboat hired from Murray Bridge on the River Murray.

name: Love Life Houseboat
note: Self-drive luxury houseboat hired from Younghusband upstream of Mannum on the Murray River.

name: Mildura Houseboats
note: Local operator of 20+ years with a fleet of 16 self-drive spa houseboats on the Murray River at Mildura.

name: All Seasons Houseboats
note: One of Australia's largest houseboat operators, with 16 mostly solar-powered self-drive boats based at Mildura.

name: River Dream Boatel
note: Five-star luxury houseboat experience on the Murray River at Mildura with en-suite staterooms.

name: Murray River Houseboats
note: Fleet of six self-drive boats, including Indulgence and Decadence, hired from Echuca on the Murray River.

name: Echuca Luxury Houseboats
note: Builds and hires brand-new self-drive luxury houseboats moored at Riverboat Dock in the Port of Echuca.

name: Deep Creek Houseboats
note: Value family self-drive houseboats based at Deep Creek Marina in the Echuca-Moama area on the Murray River.

name: Moama on Murray Houseboats
note: Self-drive houseboats up to 12 berths hired at Moama on the Murray River near Echuca.

name: Executive Houseboats
note: Four luxury self-drive vessels each sleeping up to 12, based at Moama in the Echuca region on the Murray River.

name: Murray Downs Houseboats
note: Houseboat hire from Murray Downs Marina less than 2km from Swan Hill on the Murray River.

name: WatersEdge Lake Eildon
note: Premier self-drive houseboat hire at Jerusalem Creek Marina on Lake Eildon, no boat licence required.

name: Lake Eildon Houseboats
note: Four self-drive houseboats (Deluxe 1, Getaway, Spoil Yourself, Eildon Princess) with quiet outboards on Lake Eildon.

name: Eild Marina Houseboat Hire
note: Self-drive luxury houseboats including the 10-berth Senator and 12-berth Diplomat and Sirocco on Lake Eildon.

name: 5 Rivers Eildon
note: Premium self-drive houseboat fleet operating from Eild Marina on Lake Eildon.

name: Houseboat Holidays (Lake Eildon Marina)
note: Self-drive houseboat hire and bookings from Lake Eildon Marina, no boat licence required.

name: Hawkesbury Afloat
note: Self-drive fleet of modern houseboats sleeping 2 to 12, based at Brooklyn Marina on the Hawkesbury River.

name: Holidays Afloat & Ripples Houseboat Hire
note: Large fleet of modern and traditional houseboats and cruisers hired from Brooklyn on the Hawkesbury River.

name: Able Hawkesbury River Houseboats
note: Established 30+ years at Wisemans Ferry, the largest Hawkesbury fleet with nine houseboat sizes including spa boats.

name: Hawkesbury Houseboats
note: Luxury spa boats, houseboats, day boats and kayaks for hire on the Hawkesbury River at Wisemans Ferry.

name: Mandurah Houseboats
note: Award-winning family fleet of 16 self-drive houseboats exploring the Peel Inlet, Harvey Estuary and Murray River WA.
